rejection.message: fanout.groups.advisors.threshold_gates.0.sentiment is not supported; graph policy must evaluate structured fields.

input.yaml:
name: fanout
fanout:
  groups:
    advisors:
      threshold_gates:
        - step: risk
          field: risk_score
          above: 0.8
          action: pause
          sentiment: negative
steps:
  - id: risk
    mode: fanout
    fanout_group: advisors
    skill: ../../skills/echo
